parameters.jsCode:
const source = $node['Preparing Images for HTML'].json;
const prompt = `HIPSTERSTYLE WORDPRESS HTML RENDERER

You are generating one final Hebrew HTML article for WordPress.
Output raw HTML only.
Start with <article and end with </article>.
No comments.
No style blocks.
No class attributes.
Inline CSS only on each element.
Use onmouseover, onmouseout, and ontoggle handlers for hover and accordion effects.
Article element must have id="hs-top", dir="rtl", lang="he".

Include JSON-LD Article and FAQ schema as script tags immediately after the opening article tag, before any visible content.
- Article schema: headline, description, author (Organization: היפסטר), publisher (Organization with logo URL https://hipsterstyle.co.il/cdn/shop/files/hipster_logo_black.png), dates, language he.
- FAQPage schema: mainEntity array matching FAQ questions and answers.

No content after the author section (floating buttons use position:fixed).
The author section must be the final visible section in the markup.
The floating Back to Top and Contact buttons must use position:fixed so they are outside normal flow.

Use only verified site facts for HipsterStyle:
- Site: https://hipsterstyle.co.il/
- Contact: https://hipsterstyle.co.il/pages/contact
- Logo: https://hipsterstyle.co.il/cdn/shop/files/hipster_logo_black.png
- Brand name: היפסטר
- Description: מותג אופנת ילדים ישראלי — סטייל שונה מכולם
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/HipsterBabyCollection
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/hipster.style/

Preserve real internal and external links from the injected article content.
Use real product images only.
Skip products without usable images.
Use object-fit:contain and height:auto for all product images.
Product grid: display:inline-block with vertical-align:top, width:30%, min-width:220px.

TOC title must be exactly תוכן עניינים.
TOC must be right after the summary card, closed by default, one column, and not numbered.
Use nav with div wrappers for TOC links, not ul/li.
Accordion indicator: plain text + span with float:left. Swap via ontoggle="this.firstElementChild.lastElementChild.textContent=this.open?'\u2212':'+'"

FAQ items must be separate details elements, closed by default, not numbered. Same accordion indicator pattern.

Author section: show logo image (max-width:180px), brand name, description, social links as text-based buttons (Facebook and Instagram), CTA button to main site.
Social link buttons: text labels only (no SVG icons), styled with border, padding, border-radius.
Floating buttons: Back to Top (triangle up HTML entity, anchor to #hs-top) and Contact (envelope HTML entity, link to contact page). position:fixed, z-index:999, border-radius:50%, right side, clamp() sizing.

Do NOT use display:flex or display:grid in inline styles (WordPress strips display property).
Do NOT use class attributes (no style block to define them).

Design anchors: accent #c8a97e, card bg #f9f6f1, border #e8e0d4, text #2d2d2d, heading #1a1a1a.

Use the exact locked injection block below as-is. Do not add any other N8N expressions for products, article content, or images.

### מוצרים זמינים:
{{ JSON.stringify($json["products"], null, 2) }}

### תוכן הכתבה:
{{ $("Writing Blog").first().json.output }}

חובה! להקפיד לשים במאמר הקישורים החיצוניים וגם הקישורים הפנימיים כמו שקיבלת בתוכן הכתבה.

### תמונות זמינות:
Section image 1 URL: {{ $("Preparing Images for HTML").first().json.images.section_1.url }}
Section image 2 URL: {{ $("Preparing Images for HTML").first().json.images.section_2.url }}
Section image 3 URL: {{ $("Preparing Images for HTML").first().json.images.section_3.url }}
Section image 4 URL: {{ $("Preparing Images for HTML").first().json.images.section_4.url }}
Hero image URL:      {{ $("Preparing Images for HTML").first().json.images.hero.url }}

Create a premium editorial structure: JSON-LD schemas, introduction, summary card, TOC, six H2 body sections, product grid, FAQ, author section, floating buttons.`;

return {
  json: {
    ...source,
    htmlPrompt: prompt
  }
};

parameters.jsonBody: ={"text": "{{ $node['Normalize Input'].json.businessName }} article prepared: {{ $node['Prepare WordPress Post'].json.title }} - {{ $node['Publish to WordPress'].json.link || 'Draft saved' }}"}
